subcodes.first_line: Were man's happiness and exalted station confined to this dust-heap of a world, manifest loss and grievous regret would it be, for it is thought that this realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر سعادت و علوّ منزلت انسان در اين جهان خاکی بود خسران مبين بود و حسرتی عظيم ، جنين را گمان چنين که عالم وجود
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
